The GraphGraph component is supposed to be targetted at El Alto release, isn't it?

There does not appear to be a dublin branch yet in oom repo nor aai/oom repo, so I guess that means master is still for Dublin release.

I don't think we want this to interfere with the Dublin release or testing phase.
